description: This file defines the AppState class in a Flutter application, managing application state including user session, notes, tags, and UI notifications. It handles user authentication, note CRUD operations, and state notifications via ChangeNotifier.

classes.name: AppState
classes.description: A ChangeNotifier class that manages the application's UI state, user session, notes, tags, and UI messages within a Flutter app.

methods.name: initialize
methods.description: Initializes the app state by loading user session and setting up initial data.

methods.name: setQuery
methods.description: Sets the search query string and triggers data reload.

methods.name: setTagFilter
methods.description: Sets the tag filter for notes and triggers data reload.

methods.name: clearSnackMessage
methods.description: Clears the snack message after being displayed.

methods.name: refreshIfNeeded
methods.description: Reloads notes and tags from the repository if marked as needing reload.

methods.name: login
methods.description: Performs a simple offline login using email and password, creating and saving a session.

methods.name: logout
methods.description: Logs out the user, clearing the session and associated data.

methods.name: createNote
methods.description: Creates a new note associated with the current session.
